name: Veal Scallops with Apricot-Citrus Compote
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine apricots and boiling water in a small bowl; let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Add orange juice, bourbon, orange peel, and ginger; stir to blend. (The mixture can be prepared up to 3 hours ahead. Cover and let it stand at room temperature.)
3. Melt butter in a heavy skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Season the veal with salt and pepper.
5. Add veal to the skillet and sauté until brown and cooked through, about 2 minutes per side.
6. Using tongs, transfer veal to plates.
7. Add the apricot mixture to the skillet and cook until it thickens, scraping up any browned bits, about 1 minute.
8. Mix in green onion.
9. Season the compote with salt and pepper.
10. Spoon the compote over the veal and serve.
NOTE: Dried cranberries can be used instead of dried apricots.
